nasb.text: While the sun was setting, all those who had any who were sick with various diseases brought them to Him; and laying His hands on each one of them, He was healing them.

esv.text: Now when the sun was setting, all those who had any who were sick with various diseases brought them to him, and he laid his hands on every one of them and healed them.

cnv.text: 日落的時候，不論害甚麼病的人，都被帶到耶穌那裡；他一一為他們按手，醫好他們。

ccb.text: 到了黄昏，人们把患各种疾病的人带到耶稣面前。耶稣把手按在病人身上，一一治好他们，

csbs.text: 日落的时候，众人把患有各种疾病的人都带到耶稣那里。他按手在他们每一个人身上，使他们痊愈。
